lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: Fourteenth report, and the release scripts finally got fixed by a human commit (23d2e3d, 0cf885f) that landed 2026-06-08 afternoon, after yesterday's bar-raise ran. Three carried findings are now closed: the leaked Discord webhook was untracked and gitignored (and the repo is private, so it was never a public leak), release.ps1 gained a fatal preship pnpm build gate, and write-dashboard-status.ps1 now preserves the live barRaise block instead of nulling it. What remains is a cosmetic tail of three MEDIUMs: the dashboard still hardcodes milestone M2 on a v0.4.1 app, DESIGN.md is two releases stale, and the discord-notify em-dash sanitizer still targets a mojibake byte form. Zero HIGH, no running-app bug exposure; one cleanup commit lands this at healthy.
